description: Reminds the agent to update context before stopping after meaningful work

hooks.prompt:
You are evaluating whether Claude Code should stop or first update context.

Hook input: $ARGUMENTS

RULES:
1. If stop_hook_active is true, respond {"ok": true} — updates are already in progress.
2. If the session was only Q&A, greetings, clarifications, or brief responses, respond {"ok": true}.
3. If meaningful work was completed (code changes, data analysis, research with findings, multi-step tasks, workflow execution), respond {"ok": false} with the reason below.

When returning ok: false, use this exact reason:
"Before stopping, update context with anything useful from this session. Use the context-manager skill: review what was learned, create or update context pages in context/*.md."

Respond with JSON only: {"ok": true} or {"ok": false, "reason": "..."}
